name: Patron Job Generation Table
source: Five Parsecs from Home Core Rules p.75-77
description: Tables for generating patron job offers during the World Step

patron_contact_table.description: Roll to determine if patron contact is made

2-6.description: No patron contact made this turn
2-6.narrative: Despite your efforts, no suitable patrons are interested

7-8.description: Contact with minor patron offering small jobs
7-8.narrative: You make contact with a local patron with modest needs

9-10.description: Contact with regular patron offering standard jobs
9-10.narrative: A respectable patron approaches with legitimate work

11.description: Contact with major patron offering significant jobs
11.narrative: An influential patron takes interest in your capabilities

12.description: Contact with elite patron offering lucrative opportunities
12.narrative: A powerful patron offers access to high-stakes operations

SAVVY.description: Savvy characters know where to look for work

CAPITAL.description: Capital worlds have many potential patrons

FRONTIER.description: Frontier worlds have fewer established patrons

BACKWATER.description: Backwater worlds rarely attract quality patrons

job_type_table.description: Determine the type of job offered by patron

1.description: Transport goods or information to destination

2.description: Protect person or convoy during travel

4.description: Guard facility or person against threats

8.description: Survey unknown areas or recover artifacts

WAR_ZONE.description: War zone premium for extreme risk

reputation_requirements.rule: Some job types require minimum reputation levels
reputation_requirements.description: High-risk jobs require proven track records

equipment_requirements.rule: Jobs may specify required equipment or capabilities
equipment_requirements.description: Patrons ensure crews can handle job requirements

time_pressure.rule: Some jobs have time limits or urgency factors
time_pressure.description: Time-sensitive missions may offer bonuses or penalties

ongoing_relationships.rule: Successful job completion improves patron relationship
ongoing_relationships.description: Good performance leads to better future opportunities
